# GENESIS Social Preview Image Guide

## Specifications

- **Size**: 1280x640 pixels (2:1 aspect ratio)
- **Format**: PNG or JPG
- **Max file size**: 1MB
- **Location**: Repository settings → Social preview

## Design Elements

### Background
- **Color**: Professional gradient
  - Primary: #1976D2 (Blue - engineering trust)
  - Secondary: #673AB7 (Purple - innovation)
  - Gradient: Diagonal from top-left to bottom-right

### Logo/Branding
- **GENESIS ASCII Logo** (centered, top third)
- Use professional monospace font (Courier New or similar)
- Color: White (#FFFFFF)

### Text Elements

**Main Title** (center):
```
GENESIS DUAL-SYSTEM V3.0.1
```
- Font: Roboto Bold, 72px
- Color: White (#FFFFFF)

**Subtitle** (below title):
```
Austrian Building Compliance & Safety Validation
```
- Font: Roboto Regular, 36px
- Color: Light Gray (#E0E0E0)

**Features** (bottom third, in columns):
```
ISO 26262 ASIL-D  |  EU AI Act  |  TRL 5  |  Open Source
```
- Font: Roboto Medium, 28px
- Color: White (#FFFFFF)

### Badges (bottom right corner)
- TRL 5 badge
- ISO 26262 badge
- EU AI Act badge
- GitHub Stars count

## Design Tools

### Option 1: Canva (Free)
1. Go to canva.com
2. Create custom size: 1280x640px
3. Add gradient background
4. Add text elements
5. Export as PNG

### Option 2: Figma (Free)
1. Go to figma.com
2. Create frame: 1280x640px
3. Design with layers
4. Export as PNG (2x resolution)

### Option 3: GIMP (Free, Open Source)
1. Download from gimp.org
2. Create new image: 1280x640px
3. Use gradient tool
4. Add text layers
5. Export as PNG

## Quick Template

If you want to create it quickly, use this Canva template link:
https://www.canva.com/design/DAF... (create and share)

## Upload Instructions

1. Go to GitHub repository settings
2. Navigate to "Settings" → "Options"
3. Scroll to "Social preview"
4. Click "Upload an image"
5. Select your 1280x640px image
6. Save changes

## Preview

After uploading, your social preview will appear when:
- Repository is shared on Twitter/X
- Repository is shared on LinkedIn
- Repository is shared on Slack
- GitHub README is viewed
- Open Graph metadata is parsed

## Example Preview Text

**GitHub will display:**
```
GENESIS DUAL-SYSTEM V3.0.1
Production-ready safety validation system for Austrian building compliance.
ISO 26262 ASIL-D | EU AI Act Article 12 | TRL 5 | 7,550+ LOC
```

## Color Palette (for reference)

```css
Primary Blue:    #1976D2
Secondary Purple: #673AB7
Success Green:   #388E3C
Warning Amber:   #FFA000
Error Red:       #D32F2F
Background:      #FAFAFA
Text White:      #FFFFFF
Text Gray:       #E0E0E0
```

## Fonts

- **Primary**: Roboto (Google Fonts)
- **Monospace**: Courier New or Monaco
- **Fallback**: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif

## Tips

1. **Keep it simple**: Don't overcrowd the image
2. **High contrast**: Ensure text is readable
3. **Professional**: Use consistent branding
4. **Test**: View at different sizes (mobile, desktop)
5. **Update**: Change image when releasing major versions

## Alternative: Use GitHub's Default

If you don't create a custom image, GitHub will:
- Show repository name
- Show description
- Show language badges
- Use default GitHub styling

**But:** A custom image looks more professional and increases click-through rates by ~40%.
